name: hero-v8-sample-b-16x9
prompt: Create a second premium Surnex homepage hero variant. Use the attached anchor image only as a style reference. Dark premium modular UI world, controlled lime routing energy, more product-faithful layout than abstract art, realistic dashboard modules, layered but restrained depth, strong focal hierarchy, one main product cluster, cinematic 16:9 composition, sharp contrast, operator-grade, elegant and modern. Slightly more dynamic signal movement than the first variant. No readable text. No fake UI labels. No logo. No wordmark. No generic AI wallpaper. Output image only.
